title: Dzogchen Practitioner's Daily Manual
author: Tulku Urgyen Rinpoche
description: This book is an unmistaken source book on how great practitioners of the Dzogchen spent their days and lives. Dzogchen Practitioner's Daily Manual by Kyabje Tullku Urgyen Rinpoche is compiled with the wish to keep it as simple as possible. What is offered to Dzogchen Yogis and Yoginis is a practice
